top_signals.title: Embraer Arijan Meijer on Tariff Impact Within Aviation
top_signals.summary: Embraer CEO Arijan Meijer speaks at the International Air Transport Association (IATA) on the impact of tariffs saying it "makes sense" for aviation to be excluded. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Poland, China lead renewed central bank gold buying
top_signals.summary: After being net sellers in March, banks added a net 17 tonnes of gold to reserves in April.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: 'Bring 'em on': Most profitable airline Delta wants United's crown over the Pacific, too
top_signals.summary: Delta's president, Peter Carter, told CNBC that the carrier wants to take United on over the Pacific.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
